name: Reece Limited
analysis: REH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$15.9600. Trade idea: entry A$15.9900, stop A$13.1868, target A$24.3996 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
